name: Individual
description: Individual schema from TM Forum API

allOf.description: Individual represents a single human being (a man, woman or child). The individual can be a customer, an employee or any other person that the organization needs to store information about.

placeOfBirth.description: Reference to the place where the individual was born

countryOfBirth.description: Country where the individual was born

title.description: Useful for titles (aristocratic, social,...) Pr, Dr, Sir, ...

preferredGivenName.description: Contains the chosen name by which the individual prefers to be addressed. Note: This name may be a name other than a given name, such as a nickname

legalName.description: Legal name or birth name (name one has for official purposes)

name.description: Full name flatten (first, middle, and last names) - this is the name that is expected to be presented in reference data types such as PartyRef, RelatedParty, etc. that refer to Individual

formattedName.description: A fully formatted name in one string with all of its pieces in their proper place and all of the necessary punctuation. Useful for specific contexts (Chinese, Japanese, Korean)

location.description: Temporary current location of the individual (may be used if the individual has approved its sharing)

otherName.description: List of other names by which this individual is known

individualIdentification.description: List of official identifications issued to the individual, such as passport, driving licence, social security number

disability.description: List of disabilities suffered by the individual

languageAbility.description: List of national languages known by the individual

skill.description: List of skills exhibited by the individual

familyName.description: Contains the non-chosen or inherited name. Also known as last name in the Western context
